---
title: "Ananya's Portfolio"
image: image/ananya.png
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/ananya-mahadeva
      target: _blank
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/AnanyaMahadeva
      target: _blank
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:ananyam461@gmail.com
---

## ✨ Welcome to My Page!
## 👋 Hi, I’m Ananya Mahadeva

🎓 Business Analytics student at Dublin City University  
💼 2.7 years of experience at Accenture  

### About Me

I am passionate about using data analytics and machine learning to solve real-world business problems.

I focus on transforming complex datasets into clear, actionable insights that support strategic decision-making.

Explore my projects where I apply analytics and machine learning to solve real-world problems:

👉 [View Projects](projects/index.qmd)
